properties.tree_description:
This 23-inch DBH sweetgum tree is completely dead and qualifies as a DDH (Dead, Dying, and Hazardous) tree. Approximately 30% of the upper canopy has already failed and fallen into lower utility lines, demonstrating active structural failure and advanced deterioration. The remaining canopy is highly brittle and unstable, with dead limbs directly overhanging utility conductors, a nearby transformer, and the residence.Reason for Removal:Dead tree
